---
sec: index
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero column-screen">
  <div class="site-intro">
    <h2 class="site-title">Bienvenue</h2>
    <div class="social-icon-links" aria-hidden="true">
      `r social_icon(id = "mail", icon = "envelope", fa = "fa")`
      `r social_icon(id = "insta", icon = "instagram")`
      `r social_icon(id = "twitter", icon = "x-twitter")`
      `r social_icon(id = "facebook", icon = "facebook-f")`
      `r social_icon(id = "linkedin", icon = "linkedin-in")`
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.column-screen}
![](_img/lille_cut.png)
:::

::: {.logo-alisp}
![](_img/logo-alisp.png)
:::

```{css, index-title-css}
#title-block-header {

  .quarto-title-banner {

    padding: 8rem;

    .quarto-title {
        margin: 0;
    }

    h1.title {
        padding: 0;
        font-size: 5rem;
    }

    .description {
        padding-top: 1rem;
        font-size: 2rem;
    }

  }

}
```

`r knit_section()`
